# Project Closeout Checklist

## Purpose
Ensure all project activities are formally closed, learnings are captured, and the team is set up for future success before the project is archived.

---

## How to Use
Complete this checklist at the end of a project, major release, or program phase. The Project Manager is accountable for completion; tasks may be delegated.

**Project:** `[Project Name]`
**Closeout Date:** `YYYY-MM-DD`
**Project Manager:** `[Name]`

---

## 1 — Delivery Confirmation

- [ ] All committed scope delivered (or deferrals formally documented and approved)
- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified by Product Manager
- [ ] Post-deploy verification complete (see [Release Readiness Checklist](release-readiness-checklist.md))
- [ ] No critical open bugs or incidents
- [ ] Success metrics baseline captured (for post-launch measurement)

---

## 2 — Documentation & Knowledge Transfer

- [ ] Project documentation up to date in `docs/` (or agreed location)
- [ ] Architecture / technical design docs finalized
- [ ] Runbooks and operational playbooks updated and accessible
- [ ] Handoff completed to support / operations team
- [ ] Onboarding guide or "where to start" notes updated
- [ ] Repository cleaned up: branches merged or deleted, stale issues closed

---

## 3 — Risk & Issue Closure

- [ ] All open Risk Register items reviewed; residual risks transferred to operations
- [ ] All open Issues in the RAID log closed or transferred
- [ ] Assumptions validated and discrepancies documented
- [ ] All outstanding Dependencies resolved or handed off
- [ ] Decision Log is complete and accessible

---

## 4 — Financial & Resource Closure

- [ ] Final budget vs. actuals summary prepared (if tracked)
- [ ] Any outstanding vendor/contract items resolved
- [ ] Team members' allocations updated / released back to resource pool
- [ ] Software licenses / environment costs reviewed for post-project need

---

## 5 — Stakeholder Communication

- [ ] Project closure communicated to stakeholders
- [ ] Final status update / summary report distributed
- [ ] Customer/user communication sent (if applicable)
- [ ] Lessons-learned summary shared with relevant teams

---

## 6 — Retrospective

- [ ] Retrospective conducted (see [Retrospective Guide](../octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md))
- [ ] Retrospective notes and action items captured
- [ ] Action items assigned to owners and added to team backlog or next project
- [ ] Process improvement suggestions submitted (via issue template if applicable)

---

## 7 — Archive

- [ ] Project board / tracker marked as closed / archived
- [ ] All project artifacts stored in agreed location (link: `[URL]`)
- [ ] Access permissions reviewed (remove temp contributors, update team access)
- [ ] Project repository tagged with release version (if applicable)

---

## Sign-Off

| Role | Name | Date | Signature / Approval |
|------|------|------|---------------------|
| Project Manager | | YYYY-MM-DD | |
| Product Manager | | YYYY-MM-DD | |
| Sponsor | | YYYY-MM-DD | |
